svg.text: Fully Automated Daily Checks Architecture - Zero Manual Intervention
2️⃣ CyberArk data automatically pulled via API
3️⃣ All Sentinel KQL checks executed automatically
4️⃣ PowerShell comparison runs in Azure Function
6️⃣ Email sent to distribution list with attachments
7️⃣ All CSVs stored in organized folder structure
⏱️ Time Saved: ~2 hours/day manual work eliminated
⚡ Speed: Results delivered by 6:30 AM daily
📊 Accuracy: No human error in data processing
📈 Scalability: Easy to add more checks
🔐 Security: Managed identities, no credentials stored
⏰ Daily Schedule: 6:00 AM trigger → 6:30 AM email delivery
⏰ Weekly Schedule: Sunday 7:00 AM for weekly checks
⚙️ PHASE 2 ALTERNATIVE APPROACHES — Choose Your Processing Engine
Each option can replace or complement the Azure Function processing step
🚀 Full Automation - Zero Manual Intervention Required | Version 2.0 - April 2026
